key_findings: Only one training_fee record (R004223) exceeds the 3500元 policy standard: amount is 3700元
R004223 has special_approval=0, meaning it is not exempt under Article 12 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md
R004223 exceeds the standard by 200元 (5.71%), violating Article 2 of 05_training_expense.md and Article 12 of 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md
Employee E0009 (张婷, D1/部门经理, 财务管理部 D009) submitted and self-approved this expense (AR-02 tier)
No training_fee records have special_approval=1 in the entire population
Department D009 has sufficient remaining budget (32,005.94元 of 191,300元), so budget exhaustion is not a factor
The record has status 'approved' despite exceeding the standard without special approval
